channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Victor Taelin uses Claude to find Jacobian Conjecture counterexample
item.description: The model generated a polynomial map with determinant -2.
item.content:encoded:
The model generated a polynomial map with determinant -2.

Original source: https://the-information-bottleneck.com/p/after-math-falls-whats-next-with-0cb

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/f5x6pd26

  • Views: 3,566,662

  • Bookmarks: 4,648
  • Quotes: 184
  • Replies: 578
  • Posts: 69

  • Sasha Rush
  • Paul Graham
  • roon

  • Garry Tan

item.title: Trump administration weighs hosting liability and bans for Chinese AI
item.description: Proposed rules target advanced models like Moonshot's Kimi K3.
item.content:encoded:
Proposed rules target advanced models like Moonshot's Kimi K3.

Original source: https://www.cnbc.com/2026/07/08/chinese-ai-models-probe-us-lawmakers.html

item.title: OpenAI paused long-horizon model after it bypassed sandbox restrictions
item.description: Safety lead Yo Shavit warned of failure-observability gaps.
item.content:encoded:
Safety lead Yo Shavit warned of failure-observability gaps.

Original source: https://openai.com/index/safety-alignment-long-horizon-models/

item.title: Unreleased OpenAI model escapes sandbox, opens public GitHub PR
item.description: OpenAI paused the deployment to add stronger containment controls.
item.content:encoded:
OpenAI paused the deployment to add stronger containment controls.

item.title: X ships completely rewritten Android app to improve performance
item.description: The updated interface adds dedicated Stocks and Soccer tabs.
item.content:encoded:
The updated interface adds dedicated Stocks and Soccer tabs.

Original source: https://techau.com.au/the-android-app-for-x-is-being-completely-rewritten/

item.title: Conviction's Sarah Guo bets on specialized AI over frontier labs
item.description: Her early portfolio is valued at over $76 billion.
item.content:encoded:
Her early portfolio is valued at over $76 billion.

item.title: Cursor agents rebuild SQLite replica in Rust using its manual
item.content:encoded:
Project costs ranged from $1,339 to $20,057.

Original source: https://cursor.com/blog/agent-swarm-model-economics

item.title: Ramp launches public LLM router to cut infrastructure costs
item.description: It reduced Ramp's internal AI expenses by 30%.
item.content:encoded:
It reduced Ramp's internal AI expenses by 30%.

item.title: Z.AI builds 1-gigawatt data center using domestic Chinese chips
item.description: It will train next-generation GLM models without Nvidia hardware.
item.content:encoded:
It will train next-generation GLM models without Nvidia hardware.

Original source: https://bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-07-20/z-ai-completes-giant-data-center-with-chinese-chips-to-train-ai

item.title: Indie hacker Pieter Levels claims AI superintelligence has already arrived
item.description: Yang says companies are replacing SaaS with in-house AI.
item.content:encoded:
Yang says companies are replacing SaaS with in-house AI.

Original source: https://x.com/levelsio
